name: Oryx's Escutcheon
description: Notes Unlike other shields, this ability does not fire any shots. Instead, it calls down three sequential Exalted Beams on the cursor location, dealing huge armor-piercing AoE damage and stunning foes hit for a total of 3.2 seconds (provided all beams land). This unique mechanic allows it to stun foes for potentially longer than any other shield and extends the maximum range from a slightly lower 3 tiles to an effective 5.75, which is nearly double that of any other shield.
effects: On Ability Use: Summons three consecutive Exalted Beams that each deal 1000-1200 damage in a 2.75 square radius, inflicting Stunned for 2 seconds Ignores defense of target
